candidates.raw_text:
GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN
The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No SE/TFT/017851) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of European preferential origin.
candidates.normalized_text: Goods of European Community Origin; European preferential origin

candidates.source: Invoice, Comm. code / Product code columns

criteria_met: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' identified in invoice footer and header as invoice issuer.
Consignee 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv' identified in invoice Ship-to and Payer fields.
Delivery nr. 2012600936 in invoice matches certificate remarks reference.

consignor.certificate_value: Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (footer); VAT.NO: SE556821587401

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name 'Elmo Sweden AB' anywhere in invoice files
comparison_steps.result: FOUND - 'Elmo Sweden AB' appears in invoice footer postal address block on pages 1 and 2, and in payment instructions on page 2. The invoice is issued by Elmo Sweden AB.

comparison_steps.description: Verify company name match
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - 'Elmo Sweden AB' in certificate exactly matches 'Elmo Sweden AB' in invoice footer.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Sweden
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Invoice footer explicitly states 'SWEDEN'. VAT number prefix 'SE' confirms Sweden. Country verified.

rules_applied.description: Group structure - consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer
Country verification via VAT prefix SE and explicit 'SWEDEN' in footer

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor is 'Elmo Sweden AB' in Sweden. The invoice is issued by 'Elmo Sweden AB' as shown in the footer postal address block on both pages and in payment instructions. The footer also explicitly states 'SWEDEN' and provides VAT number SE556821587401 (SE prefix confirms Sweden). Per rule 4.1.0, the consignor name was found explicitly in the invoice. Name match is exact. Country match is confirmed via explicit 'SWEDEN' text and SE-prefix on VAT number per rule 4.1.2.1. Result: MATCH.
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' is the invoice issuer, explicitly identified in the invoice footer as 'Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN'. Country Sweden verified via explicit text and VAT prefix SE.

consignee.certificate_value: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv, Avenida Industrial #168, 37564 Leon, Mexico
consignee.invoice_value: Ship-to: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.Vv, Avenida Industrial #168, 37564 - Leon GTO, Mexico; Payer: BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V., 37564 - LEON DE LOS ALDAMA GTO, Mexico

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing party in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice Payer field contains 'BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V.' at address '37564 - LEON DE LOS ALDAMA GTO, Mexico'.

comparison_steps.description: Compare certificate consignee name with invoice Payer name
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv'. Invoice Payer: 'BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V.'. After normalization of case and punctuation: 'brusarosco de mexico s.a de c.vv' vs 'brusarosco de mexico s.a. de c.v.'. The difference is 'C.Vv' vs 'C.V.' - the extra 'v' appears to be a typo. However, the Ship-to field also uses 'S.A. de C.Vv' matching the certificate exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Verify consignee against Payer field with normalization
comparison_steps.result: The core company name 'Brusarosco de Mexico' is identical. The difference 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.' is in the legal form designation. 'S.A. de C.V.' is the standard Mexican legal form (Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable). The certificate writes 'S.A de C.Vv' which appears to be a minor formatting/typo variation of the same legal form. Per rule 4.1.3.6 (applied to consignee via 4.2), variations in legal form abbreviation are allowed when the core name is identical.

comparison_steps.description: Verify country Mexico
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'Mexico'. Invoice Payer field states 'Mexico'. Invoice Ship-to field states 'Mexico'. MATCH.

rules_applied.description: Priority order for consignee identification - Payer field is primary billing field
Legal form abbreviation variation - 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.' treated as same legal form
Country verification - Mexico matches in both documents

evidence.raw_text:
BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V. ( 17500040 )
IND.ZAPATERA, FIDEICOMISO CIUDAD INDUSTRIAL 168-1,
37564 - LEON DE LOS ALDAMA GTO, Mexico

Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.Vv ( 18007237 )
Avenida Industrial #168
37564 - Leon GTO, Mexico

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv' in Mexico. Invoice Payer field (primary billing field per 4.2.0.2) contains 'BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V.' in Mexico. The core name 'Brusarosco de Mexico' is identical after case normalization. The legal form 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.' is a variation in legal form abbreviation (both refer to Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable). Per 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee, this is acceptable. Additionally, the Ship-to field contains 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.Vv' matching the certificate's spelling exactly. Country Mexico matches. Address in Ship-to matches certificate address. Result: MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv' identified in invoice Payer field as 'BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V.' and in Ship-to field as 'Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.Vv'. Core name identical, legal form variation accepted. Country Mexico matches.

goods_description.certificate_value: 2 Pallets, HS Code 4107 1291, Provence Jet Black
goods_description.invoice_value: PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I - 99203; 2 Pallets; Tarif no 4107 1291 HS

comparison_steps.description: Check if certificate contains article numbers to match
comparison_steps.result: Certificate does not contain explicit article numbers (product codes). The certificate describes goods as 'Provence Jet Black' with HS Code 4107 1291. No article number matching required.

comparison_steps.description: Identify the identity-bearing product name in certificate
comparison_steps.result: The identity-bearing main designation in the certificate is 'Provence Jet Black'.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Provence Jet Black' in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice line items describe goods as 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I - 99203'. The certificate's main designation 'Provence Jet Black' can be identified within the invoice's product description after case normalization. 'Provence' matches 'PROVENCE'. 'Jet Black' matches 'JET BLACK'. The invoice adds '600R' between 'PROVENCE' and 'JET BLACK' and 'I - 99203' after. Per rule 4.3.4, additions before or after the main designation that do not change product identity do not cause MISMATCH when the main designation is identifiable. '600R' is a specification/variant code and 'I - 99203' is an internal reference. The core product designation 'Provence Jet Black' is identifiable in the invoice description.

comparison_steps.description: Verify that all words from certificate's main designation appear in invoice in same order
comparison_steps.result: Certificate words: 'Provence', 'Jet', 'Black'. Invoice words: 'PROVENCE', '600R', 'JET', 'BLACK', 'I'. All three words from the certificate appear in the invoice in the same order (Provence → Jet → Black), with '600R' as an intervening addition. Per 4.3.3.2 this confirms identifiability.

comparison_steps.description: Assess whether additions in invoice change product identity
comparison_steps.result: '600R' is a specification/grade code. 'I - 99203' is a product variant code. Neither changes the core product identity of 'Provence Jet Black'. Per 4.3.4, these are non-identity-bearing additions. HS Code 4107 1291 matches exactly between certificate and invoice.

comparison_steps.step: Additional verification - packaging and HS code
comparison_steps.description: Verify packaging description and HS code
comparison_steps.result: Certificate: '2 Pallets', HS Code 4107 1291. Invoice: '2 Pallets', Tarif no 4107 1291 HS. Both match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Identity-bearing main designation 'Provence Jet Black' identified in invoice line items
All words from certificate main designation found in invoice in same order with intervening additions
Non-identity-bearing additions ('600R', 'I - 99203') do not affect product identity

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate describes goods as 'Provence Jet Black' with HS Code 4107 1291 and 2 Pallets. Invoice line items describe 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I - 99203'. The identity-bearing main designation is 'Provence Jet Black'. All three words appear in the invoice description in the same order: PROVENCE → JET → BLACK, with '600R' as an intervening specification code. Per 4.3.4, the additions '600R' and 'I - 99203' are non-identity-bearing (specification/variant codes). HS Code 4107 1291 matches exactly. Packaging '2 Pallets' matches. Result: MATCH.
goods_description.motivation: The identity-bearing product name 'Provence Jet Black' is identifiable in the invoice's 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I' after allowed normalization. HS code 4107 1291 and packaging '2 Pallets' match exactly.

quantity.certificate_value: 1397,61 M2; Gross Weight 1266 kgs; Net Weight 1126 kgs
quantity.invoice_value: Total M2: 1397,61 M2; Gross weight 1266 kgs; Net weight 1126 kgs

comparison_steps.description: Identify the quantities in Box 7 of the certificate
comparison_steps.result: Box 7 contains three quantity values: 1397,61 M2 (area), 1266 kgs (Gross Weight), 1126 kgs (Net Weight). All three are in Box 7.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 1397.61 M2 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice summary block states 'Total M2: 1397,61 M2'. Exact match.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 1266 kgs in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice summary block states 'Gross weight 1266 kgs'. Exact match with category GW.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 1126 kgs in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice summary block states 'Net weight 1126 kgs'. Exact match with category NW.

comparison_steps.description: Check if any quantities contradict
comparison_steps.result: All three quantities match exactly. No contradiction. Per 4.4.3.1, at least one verified and no contradiction exists.

rules_applied.description: Direct identification of all three quantity values in invoice
Multiple quantities all verified, no contradiction

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate Box 7 contains three quantities: 1397,61 M2, Gross Weight 1266 kgs, Net Weight 1126 kgs. Invoice summary block contains: 'Total M2: 1397,61 M2', 'Gross weight 1266 kgs', 'Net weight 1126 kgs'. All three values match exactly between certificate and invoice, including weight categories (GW/NW) and units (M2/kgs). No discrepancy. Result: MATCH.
quantity.motivation: All three quantity values from the certificate (1397.61 M2, Gross Weight 1266 kgs, Net Weight 1126 kgs) are identifiable in the invoice with exact matching values and units.

country_of_origin.invoice_value: Swedish Origin; GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN; European preferential origin

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin declarations in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice contains: (1) 'Swedish Origin' in summary block, (2) 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN' in declaration block, (3) 'these products are of European preferential origin' in exporter declaration. Multiple explicit origin references found.

comparison_steps.description: Verify 'EUROPEAN UNION' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'EUROPEAN UNION'. Invoice states 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN' and 'European preferential origin'. 'European Union' and 'European Community' are equivalent per 4.5.4.1. MATCH for EU component.

comparison_steps.description: Verify 'Sweden' from certificate against invoice
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'Sweden' as part of origin. Invoice states 'Swedish Origin'. 'Swedish' is the adjectival form of 'Sweden' — this is a standard language normalization. MATCH for Sweden component.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.2.1 - EU combined with one member state
comparison_steps.description: Check if EU + Sweden pattern applies
comparison_steps.result: Certificate states 'European Union, Sweden'. Invoice confirms both EU origin ('GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN', 'European preferential origin') and Swedish origin ('Swedish Origin'). This is a full confirmation per 4.5.4.2.1. MATCH.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.1 - Check for non-EU origins in invoice
comparison_steps.description: Verify no contradicting non-EU origins exist in invoice
comparison_steps.result: No non-EU origin countries found in invoice. All origin declarations point to EU/Sweden. No contradiction.

rules_applied.description: EU normalization - 'European Community' treated as equivalent to 'European Union'
EU member state normalization - 'Swedish Origin' confirms Sweden as EU member state origin
EU combined with one specific member state - full confirmation in invoice

evidence.raw_text:
GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN
The exporter of the products covered by this document (customs authorization No SE/TFT/017851) declares that, except where otherwise clearly indicated, these products are of European preferential origin.

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate origin field states 'EUROPEAN UNION, Sweden'. Invoice contains three explicit origin references: 'Swedish Origin' (summary block), 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN' (declaration), and 'European preferential origin' (exporter declaration). Per 4.5.4.1, 'European Community' equals 'European Union'. Per 4.5.4.2, Sweden is an EU member state, so 'Swedish Origin' confirms Sweden origin. Per 4.5.4.2.1, the certificate states EU + one member state (Sweden), and the invoice confirms both EU origin and Swedish origin explicitly — this is a full confirmation. No non-EU origins are present in the invoice. Result: MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states 'European Union, Sweden'. Invoice explicitly confirms both 'Swedish Origin' and 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN'. Full verification of both EU and Sweden origin components.

rule_evaluation_log.details: No Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate references '2012600936' and '3192601753' in remarks, and 'SEG-26D-465794' as certificate number. None of these are LC references.
Document A is Certificate of Origin. Document B is Invoice (2 pages). Single certificate and single invoice. Standard pairing.
Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' found in invoice footer. Consignee 'Brusarosco de Mexico' found in Payer and Ship-to fields. Delivery reference 2012600936 from certificate remarks found in invoice.
Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' found explicitly in invoice footer on pages 1 and 2.
Sweden verified via explicit 'SWEDEN' text in footer and VAT prefix SE.
Payer field contains 'BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V.' matching certificate consignee core name.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Legal form abbreviation variation for consignee
rule_evaluation_log.details: 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.' — variation in legal form abbreviation for Mexican Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable.
'Provence Jet Black' identified in invoice line item 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I'.
'600R' and 'I - 99203' are specification/variant codes that do not alter product identity.
All three quantities (1397.61 M2, 1266 kgs GW, 1126 kgs NW) found exactly in invoice.
'European Community' in invoice treated as equivalent to 'European Union' in certificate.
'Swedish Origin' confirms Sweden. Sweden is EU member state.

rule_evaluation_log.description: EU + one member state full confirmation
rule_evaluation_log.details: Certificate: EU + Sweden. Invoice: European Community Origin + Swedish Origin. Full confirmation.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Consignee name mismatch due to 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.'
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: The difference is in the legal form abbreviation only. Both refer to 'Sociedad Anónima de Capital Variable', the standard Mexican corporate designation. Per rule 4.1.3.6 applied to consignee, variations in legal form abbreviation are accepted when the core name is identical. Additionally, the Ship-to field uses the exact same spelling as the certificate ('S.A. de C.Vv'), further confirming same party.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Goods description mismatch because invoice adds '600R' and 'I - 99203' to product name
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Per rule 4.3.4, additions that do not change the product's identity do not cause MISMATCH. '600R' is a grade/specification code and 'I - 99203' is a reference number. The identity-bearing main designation 'Provence Jet Black' is fully identifiable in the invoice. Per 4.3.3.2, all words appear in the same order.

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate address differs from invoice address for consignor
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: Certificate states 'Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga'. Invoice footer states 'SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA'. The postal codes differ slightly (51250 vs 512 81 — likely the same, just formatting). However, per rule 4.1.5, differences in street address or postal code shall NOT in themselves cause MISMATCH for consignor. The determining factors are company name and country, both of which match.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer överens. Avsändaren Elmo Sweden AB identifieras som fakturautställare, mottagaren Brusarosco de Mexico identifieras i fakturans betalare- och leveransfält, varubeskrivningen Provence Jet Black återfinns i fakturan, samtliga kvantiteter matchar exakt, och ursprungslandet EU/Sverige bekräftas av fakturans ursprungsdeklaration. Dokumentparet kan godkännas automatiskt.

summary_of_matches.summary: Elmo Sweden AB identified as invoice issuer in footer. Country Sweden confirmed.
Brusarosco de Mexico identified in Payer and Ship-to fields. Country Mexico confirmed.
Provence Jet Black identifiable in invoice line items. HS code 4107 1291 and 2 Pallets match.
All quantities match exactly: 1397.61 M2, GW 1266 kgs, NW 1126 kgs.
EU/Sweden origin confirmed by 'Swedish Origin' and 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN' in invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Elmo Sweden AB, Kyrkogatan 18, 51250, Svenljunga, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Elmo Sweden AB, SE-512 81 SVENLJUNGA, SWEDEN (footer/postal address); VAT.NO: SE556821587401
sections.rule_applied: Consignor name found explicitly in invoice footer via group structure rule. Country verified via explicit text and VAT prefix.
sections.motivation: Consignor 'Elmo Sweden AB' found explicitly in the invoice footer as the invoice issuer. Country Sweden confirmed by explicit 'SWEDEN' text and VAT number prefix SE.

sections.certificate_value: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A de C.Vv, Avenida Industrial #168, 37564 Leon, Mexico
sections.invoice_value: Payer: BRUSAROSCO DE MEXICO S.A. de C.V., 37564 - LEON DE LOS ALDAMA GTO, Mexico; Ship-to: Brusarosco de Mexico S.A. de C.Vv, Avenida Industrial #168, 37564 - Leon GTO, Mexico
sections.rule_applied: Primary billing field (Payer) matched after legal form normalization. Ship-to field provides exact spelling match.
sections.motivation: Core name 'Brusarosco de Mexico' matches exactly. Legal form variation 'S.A de C.Vv' vs 'S.A. de C.V.' accepted as Mexican corporate form abbreviation. Country Mexico matches. Ship-to field confirms exact certificate spelling.

sections.certificate_value: 2 Pallets, HS Code 4107 1291, Provence Jet Black
sections.invoice_value: PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I - 99203; 2 Pallets (No. OE06-05); Tarif no 4107 1291 HS
sections.rule_applied: Identity-bearing main designation 'Provence Jet Black' found in invoice. Non-identity additions '600R' and 'I-99203' accepted.
sections.motivation: All words in the certificate's product designation 'Provence Jet Black' are found in the invoice's 'PROVENCE 600R JET BLACK I' in the same order. The additions '600R' and 'I - 99203' are specification/variant codes. HS code 4107 1291 and packaging '2 Pallets' match exactly.

sections.certificate_value: 1397,61 M2; Gross Weight 1266 kgs; Net Weight 1126 kgs
sections.invoice_value: Total M2: 1397,61 M2; Gross weight 1266 kgs; Net weight 1126 kgs
sections.rule_applied: Direct identification of all three quantity values in invoice. Exact match for area, gross weight and net weight.
sections.motivation: All three quantities from the certificate match the invoice exactly: 1397.61 M2, Gross Weight 1266 kgs, and Net Weight 1126 kgs. No discrepancy, no calculation required.

sections.invoice_value: Swedish Origin; GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN; European preferential origin
sections.rule_applied: EU normalization and EU member state normalization applied. Full confirmation of both EU and Sweden origin.
sections.motivation: Certificate states 'European Union, Sweden'. Invoice confirms 'Swedish Origin' and 'GOODS OF EUROPEAN COMMUNITY ORIGIN'. 'European Community' is equivalent to 'European Union'. Both origin components fully verified. No contradicting non-EU origins found.

output_quality_checks.notes: All five checkpoints evaluated as MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.95. No inconsistencies detected. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all MATCH statuses.
